name: sciencebasepy
documentation: This Python module provides functionality for interacting with the USGS ScienceBase platform.

modules.name: sb3.client
documentation: ScienceBase sbgraphql Client

functions.name: sb3.client.upload_cloud_file_upload_session
documentation:
\_summary\_

```
param itemid

(str) The identifier of the item to upload the file to

param file_path

Local file path to the file to upload

param mimetype

(str) The mime type of the file to upload.
If None is provided will guess the file type based on extension.

param sb_session_ex

(SBSessionEx) The session to use for the operation.

return

(json) The json item return from ScienceBase
```

functions.name: sb3.client._read_in_chunks
documentation:
Lazy function (generator) to read a file piece by piece.
Default chunk size: 1000k.

functions.name: sb3.client.delete_item
documentation:
Deletes an item using the ScienceBase GraphQL API.

Args:
    input (dict): The input parameters for the delete operation.
                    {}
    sb_session_ex (object): An instance of the ScienceBaseSessionEx class.

Returns:
    dict: The response from the ScienceBase API.

Raises:
    Exception: If the response status code is not 200 or if there are errors in the response.

functions.name: sb3.client._guess_mimetype
documentation:
Guess mimetype of file

```
param filename

Name of file for which to guess mimetype

return

mimetype of file, or 'application/octet-stream' if it cannot be guessed
```

modules.name: sb3.auth
documentation: ScienceBase Keycloak Authentication Library

classes.name: sb3.auth.DirectAccessAuthenticator

methods.name: sb3.auth.DirectAccessAuthenticator.__init__
documentation:
Handles authentication against a Keycloak auth server

```
param keycloak_uri

(str) The base URL for the keycloakserver

param realm

(str) The realm to authenticate with

param client_id

(str) Client id to use for authentication and refresh
```

methods.name: sb3.auth.DirectAccessAuthenticator.authenticate
documentation:
authenticates against the Keycloak server with a provided username and password

```
param username

(str) The AD username

param password

(str) The AD password

raises TokenAuthenticationFailed

If authentication on server fails
```

methods.name: sb3.auth.DirectAccessAuthenticator.authenticate_with_token
documentation:
Use a provided token to authenticate with Keycloak

: Tries to use the provided token to refresh to verify that the token works

```
param auth_token

(json) a json object that has "access_token" and "refresh_token" keys
```

methods.name: sb3.auth.DirectAccessAuthenticator.revoke_token
documentation:
Revoke the current session tokens
\:raises TokenAuthenticationFailed: if the revoke operation fails

methods.name: sb3.auth.DirectAccessAuthenticator.refresh_token
documentation:
Refresh the token request on the server

```
raises TokenRefreshFailed

if the request returns a response except [200]
```

methods.name: sb3.auth.DirectAccessAuthenticator._set_expiry
documentation:
Set the datetime when the current token will expire
This is set to the soonest of the "token_expire" time and "token_refresh_expire" time
contained in this instance's _auth_token

methods.name: sb3.auth.DirectAccessAuthenticator.get_token_expiry
documentation:
Returns the datetime that the current token will expire

: uses the soonest of the token and refresh token times

```
return

(datetime) the soonest of the current token and refresh token times
```

methods.name: sb3.auth.DirectAccessAuthenticator.get_access_token
documentation: get_access_token

methods.name: sb3.auth.DirectAccessAuthenticator.get_refresh_token
documentation: get_refresh_token

methods.name: sb3.auth.DirectAccessAuthenticator.get_token_expire
documentation: get_token_expire

methods.name: sb3.auth.DirectAccessAuthenticator.get_refresh_token_expire
documentation: get_refresh_token_expire

DirectAccessAuthenticator
Authenticates with the Keycloak server using Direct Access

classes.name: sb3.auth.TokenAuthenticationFailed

methods.name: sb3.auth.TokenAuthenticationFailed.__init__
documentation:
Custom exception used to provide informative error messages from Keycloak

```
param response

The response from the requests post

param which

(str) either 'Authentication' or 'Token Refresh', defaults to 'Authentication'
```
Exception raised for errors returned when authenticating

documentation:
Log into ScienceBase using Keycloak

The ScienceBase user to log in as

The ScienceBase password for the given user

return

The SbSessionEx object with the user logged in
```

documentation:
Add in a token as a json or dictionary

Args:

documentation:
Checks if the current refresh token can be refreshed. 
If it has expired or can't be refreshed the user is not logged in

Delete an existing ScienceBase Item

documentation:
\_summary\_

```
return

(str)
```

methods.name: sb3.SbSessionEx.SbSessionEx.get_refresh_token
documentation: Refresh tokens in ScienceBaseEx

methods.name: sb3.SbSessionEx.SbSessionEx.refresh_token
documentation: Force refresh of token

methods.name: sb3.SbSessionEx.SbSessionEx.refresh_token_before_expire
documentation:
Refresh token if token has not expired, but will expire within some time,
if token will expire with in that time then refresh will be triggered

\:param time_remaining in seconds, before token expiry, to trigger refresh

```
return

True, if refresh is done, False, refresh is not triggered
```

methods.name: sb3.SbSessionEx.SbSessionEx.refresh_token_time_remaining
documentation:
Use for printing remaining time
useful for debugging session timeout

methods.name: sb3.SbSessionEx.SbSessionEx.revoke_token
documentation: Revoke the tokens for the current session

methods.name: sb3.SbSessionEx.SbSessionEx.get_header
documentation: get_header

SbSessionEx provides extra methods for working with ScienceBase GraphQL
as well as authentication using Keycloak.

modules.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession
documentation: This Python module provides some basic services for interacting with ScienceBase.

classes.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.__init__
documentation: Initialize session and set JSON headers

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.get_token
documentation:
Convenience function to help users in obtaining a token for authentication.

Opens SB manager in the default system browser and 
prints instructions for copying and using the token

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.add_token
documentation:
Add Keycloak access token for authentication

```
param token_json

json object obtained from "Copy API Key" button in ScienceBase Manager
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.refresh_token
documentation:
Force refresh the access and refresh tokens

```
param refresh_time_limit

The time limit in seconds before the token expires to refresh the token
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession._refresh_check
documentation: Refresh our Keycloak token if it's going to expire within 10 min

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.login
documentation:
Log into ScienceBase

```
param username

The ScienceBase user to log in as

param password

The ScienceBase password for the given user

return

The SbSession object with the user logged in
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession._update_headers_keycloak
documentation: Updates the session's headers with the keycloak authorization headers

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.logout
documentation: Log out of ScienceBase by revoking the Keycloak tokens

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.loginc
documentation:
Log into ScienceBase, prompting for the password

```
param username

The ScienceBase user to log in as

return

The SbSession object with the user logged in
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.is_logged_in
documentation:
Determine whether the SbSession is logged in and active in ScienceBase

```
return

Whether the SbSession is logged in and active in ScienceBase.
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.ping
documentation:
Ping ScienceBase. A very low-cost operation to determine whether ScienceBase is available.

```
return

JSON response from ScienceBase Catalog
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.get_session_info
documentation:
Get the JOSSO session information for the current session

```
return

ScienceBase Josso session info
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.get_item
documentation:
Get the ScienceBase Item JSON with the given ID

```
param params

Allows you to specify query params, such as {'fields':'title,ancestors'} for ?fields=title,ancestors

return

JSON for the ScienceBase Item with the given ID
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.get_hidden_properties
documentation:
Get the list of all hidden properties for a ScienceBase Item

```
param item_id

ID of the ScienceBase Item

return

JSON for the ScienceBase Item with the given ID
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.get_hidden_property
documentation:
Get the ScienceBase hidden property JSON with the given item and Hidden Property ID

```
param item_id

ID of the ScienceBase Item

param hidden_property_id

ID of hidden property

return

JSON for the ScienceBase Item's Hidden Property with the given ID
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.find_hidden_property
documentation:
Find ScienceBase Items by hidden property value

```
param hidden_property

ScienceBase Item Hidden Property JSON: {"type": ..., "value": ...}

return

Item Hidden Property JSON containing the first page of matching ScienceBase Items. Use the next() method for
```

subsequent pages.

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.find_items_by_filter_and_hidden_property
documentation:
Search for ScienceBase items by filter and hidden property

Warning: Because of the way hidden property results must be joined to ScienceBase Catalog search results,
this method returns all matching items. Queries returning too many items may be blocked by ScienceBase.

```
param params

ScienceBase Catalog search parameters

param hidden_property

ScienceBase Item Hidden Property JSON: {"type": ..., "value": ...}

return

ScienceBase Catalog search response object containing the first page of results for the search
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.get_item_ids_by_hidden_property
documentation:
Get the ScienceBase IDs of Items associated with the given hidden property

```
param hidden_property

ScienceBase Item Hidden Property JSON: {"type": ..., "value": ...}

return

List of ScienceBase Item IDs containing the given hidden property
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.create_item
documentation:
Create a new Item in ScienceBase

```
param item_json

JSON representing the ScienceBase Catalog item to create

return

Full item JSON from ScienceBase Catalog after creation
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.create_items
documentation:
Create new Items in ScienceBase

```
param items_json

JSON list representing the ScienceBase Catalog items to create

return

Full items JSON from ScienceBase Catalog after creation
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.create_hidden_property
documentation:
Create a new Hidden Property for an Item in ScienceBase

```
param item_id

ID of the ScienceBase Item to create a hidden property for

param hidden_property_json

data (for the JSON) representing the hidden property to create

return

JSON of hidden property after creation
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.update_item
documentation:
Update an existing ScienceBase Item

```
param item_json

JSON representing the ScienceBase Catalog item to update

return

Full item JSON from ScienceBase Catalog after update
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.update_hidden_property
documentation:
Update an existing hidden property of a ScienceBase Item

```
param item_id

ID of the ScienceBase Item

param hidden_property_id

ID of hidden property

param hidden_property_json

data for updated hidden property

return

Full item JSON from ScienceBase Catalog after update
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.update_items
documentation:
Update multiple ScienceBase items

```
param items_json

List of ScienceBase Catalog Item JSON to update

return

ScienceBase JSON response
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.delete_item
documentation:
Delete an existing ScienceBase Item

```
param item_json

JSON representing the ScienceBase Catalog item to delete

return

True if the item was successfully deleted
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.delete_hidden_property
documentation:
Delete an existing Hidden Property from a ScienceBase Item

```
param item_id

ID of the ScienceBase Item

param hidden_property_id

ID of hidden property

return

True if the item was successfully deleted
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.undelete_item
documentation:
Undelete a ScienceBase Item
\:param itemid: ID of the Item to undelete
\:return: JSON of the undeleted Item

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.delete_items
documentation:
Delete multiple ScienceBase Items. This is much more efficient than using delete_item() for mass
deletions, as it performs it server-side in one call to ScienceBase.

```
param itemIds

List of Item IDs to delete

return

True if the items were successfully deleted
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.move_item
documentation:
Move an existing ScienceBase Item under a new parent

```
param itemid

ID of the Item to move

param parentid

ID of the new parent Item

return

The JSON of the moved Item
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.move_items
documentation:
Move ScienceBase Items under a new parent

```
param itemids

A list of ScienceBase Catalog Item IDs of the Items to move

param parentid

ScienceBase Catalog Item ID of the new parent Item

return

A count of the number of Items moved
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.upload_file_to_item
documentation:
Upload a file to an existing Item in ScienceBase

```
param item

ScienceBase Catalog Item JSON of the Item to update

param filename

Filenames of the file to upload

param scrape_file

Whether to scrape metadata and create extensions from special files

return

The ScienceBase Catalog Item JSON of the updated Item
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.upload_s3_files
documentation:
Upload a list of files from an external S3 bucket to an existing Item in ScienceBase

```
param itemid

ScienceBase Catalog Item ID of the item to update

param s3_path

External S3 bucket path, e.g. s3://mys3bucket/12 where files to be uploaded are located

param filenames

List of filenames in external S3 bucket, located under s3_path, to be uploaded to Item
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.upload_cloud_file_to_item
documentation:
Upload a file to cloud storage on an existing Item in ScienceBase

```
param itemid

ScienceBase Catalog Item ID of the Item to update

param filename

Filenames of the file to upload

return

The ScienceBase Catalog Item JSON of the updated Item
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.generate_S3_download_links
documentation:
generate list of bulk cloud file download tokens

```
param itemid

ScienceBase Catalog Item ID of the Item

param filenames

Filenames of the files to download

return

List of tokenized S3 download links
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.download_cloud_files
documentation:
download list of ScienceBase files using tokenized S3 download links
\:param filenames: Filenames of the files to download
\:param download_links: List of tokenized S3 download links
\:param destination: Local destination where files are to be downloaded

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.upload_file_and_create_item
documentation:
Upload a file and create a new Item in ScienceBase

```
param parentid

ScienceBase Catalog Item JSON of the Item under which to create the new Item

param filename

Filename of the file to upload

param scrape_file

Whether to scrape metadata and create extensions from special files

return

The ScienceBase Catalog Item JSON of the new Item
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.upload_files_and_create_item
documentation:
Upload multiple files and create a new Item in ScienceBase

param parentid

ScienceBase Catalog Item JSON of the Item under which to create the new Item

param filenames

Filename of the files to upload

param scrape_file

Whether to scrape metadata and create extensions from special files

return

The ScienceBase Catalog Item JSON of the new Item

documentation:
Upload multiple files and update an existing Item in ScienceBase

param item

ScienceBase Catalog Item JSON of the Item to update

param filenames

Filenames of the files to upload

param scrape_file

Whether to scrape metadata and create extensions from special files

return

The ScienceBase Catalog Item JSON of the updated Item

documentation:
Upload multiple files and create or update an Item in ScienceBase

ScienceBase Catalog Item JSON of the Item to update

Filenames of the files to upload

Whether to scrape metadata and create extensions from special files

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.upload_file
documentation:
ADVANCED USE -- USE OTHER UPLOAD METHODS IF AT ALL POSSIBLE. Upload a file to ScienceBase. The file will
be staged in a temporary area. In order to attach it to an Item, the pathOnDisk must be added to an Item
files entry, or one of a facet's file entries.

```
param filename

File to upload

param mimetype

MIME type of the file

return

JSON response from ScienceBase
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.replace_file
documentation:
Replace a file on a ScienceBase Item. This method will replace all files named
the same as the new file, whether they are in the files list or on a facet.

```
param filename

Name of the file to replace

param item

ScienceBase Catalog Item JSON of the Item on which to replace the file

return

ScienceBase Catalog Item JSON of the updated Item
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession._replace_file
documentation:
Upload a file to ScienceBase and update file json with new path on disk.

```
param filename

Name of the file to replace

param itemfile

ScienceBase Catalog ItemFile JSON

return

ScienceBase Catalog ItemFile JSON after the replace
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.get_file_checksum
documentation:
Get checksum value for a file (md5 Checksum from hashlib package)

```
param filename

File to get checksum on
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.delete_file
documentation:
Delete a file on a ScienceBase Item. This method will delete all files with the provided
name, whether they are in the files list or on a facet.

```
param sb_filename

Name of the file to delete

param item

ScienceBase Catalog Item JSON of the Item on which to delete the file

return

ScienceBase Catalog Item JSON of the updated Item
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.get_item_files_zip
documentation:
Download all files from a ScienceBase Item as a zip. The zip is created server-side
and streamed to the client.

```
param item

ScienceBase Catalog Item JSON of the item from which to download files

param destination

Destination directory in which to store the zip file

return

The full name and path of the downloaded file
```

documentation:
Retrieve file information from a ScienceBase Item

```
param item

ScienceBase Catalog Item JSON of the item from which to get file information

return

A list of dictionaries containing url, name and size of each file
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.download_file
documentation:
Download file from URL

```
param url

ScienceBase Catalog Item file download URL

param local_filename

Name to use for the local file

param destination

Destination directory in which to store the files

param progress_bar

Boolean to turn on progress bar printing

return

The full name and path of the downloaded file
```

documentation:
Download the individual files attached to a ScienceBase Item

param item

ScienceBase Catalog Item JSON of the item from which to download files

Destination directory in which to store the files

param progress_bar

Boolean to turn on progress bar printing

return

The ScienceBase Catalog file info JSON response
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.get_my_items_id

Get the ID of the logged-in user's My Items

return

The ScienceBase Catalog Item ID of the logged in user's My Items folder

Get IDs of all immediate children for a given parent

param parentid

ScienceBase Catalog Item ID of the item for which to look for children

A List of ScienceBase Catalog Item IDs of the direct children
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.get_ancestor_ids
documentation:
Get IDs of all descendants of given item excluding those which are linked in (short-cutted).

ScienceBase Catalog Item ID of the item for which to look for descendants

return

A List of ScienceBase Catalog Item IDs of the descendants

Get IDs of all shortcutted items for a given item

Create a shortcut to another item

ScienceBase Catalog Item ID of shortcutted item

ScienceBase Catalog Item ID of item containing the shortcut

JSON response from ScienceBase Catalog
```

documentation:

documentation:

OPeNDAP URL to query

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.add_extent
documentation:
Create an extent from Feature or FeatureCollection geojson and add it to the item's footprint.
There are several properties that ScienceBase stores in the master extents
table: name, shortName, description, and promotedForReuse. If desired,
they are stored in the feature_geojson['properties'] dict.

```
param item_id

ScienceBase Catalog Item ID of the item to which to add the extent

param feature_geojson

GeoJSON describing the extent to create

return

ScienceBase Catalog Item JSON of the updated item.
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.find_items
documentation:
Search for ScienceBase items

```
param params

ScienceBase Catalog search parameters

return

ScienceBase Catalog search response object containing the next page of results for the search
```

documentation:
Get the next set of items from the search

```
param items

ScienceBase Catalog search response object from a prior search

return

ScienceBase Catalog search response object containing the next page of results for the search
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.previous
documentation:
Get the previous set of items from the search

```
param items

ScienceBase Catalog search response object from a prior search

return

ScienceBase Catalog search response object containing the previous page of results for the search

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.debug
documentation:
Turn on HTTP logging for debugging purposes.
This enables debugging at httplib level (requests->urllib3->httplib)
You will see the REQUEST, including HEADERS and DATA, and RESPONSE with HEADERS but without DATA.
The only thing missing will be the response.body which is not logged.

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.get_permissions
documentation:
Get permission JSON for the item identified by item_id

```
param item_id

The ID of the ScienceBase item

return

The permissions JSON for the given item
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.set_permissions
documentation:
Set permissions for the item identified by item_id. WARNING: Advanced use only. ACL JSON
must be created properly. Use one of the ACL helper methods if at all possible.

```
param item_id

The ID of the ScienceBase item

param acls

ACL JSON

return

The permissions JSON for the given item
```

User for which to add READ permissions

param item_id

The ID of the ScienceBase item

return

The permissions JSON for the given item

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.publish_to_public_bucket
documentation:
call publish end point from catalog
this should publish all files to public s3 publish bucket
TODO: Fix documentation

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.publish_array_to_public_bucket
documentation:
publish a list of files on an item to the public s3 publish bucket

```
param item_id

The ID of the ScienceBase item

param filenames

a list of filenames to be published
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.unpublish_array_from_public_bucket
documentation:
unpublish a list of files on an item from the public s3 publish bucket

```
param item_id

The ID of the ScienceBase item

param filenames

a list of filenames to be unpublished
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.delete_cloud_files
documentation:
deletes a list of Cloud files on an item from the ScienceBase S3 content bucket and/or S3 publish bucket
and updates the item JSON accordingly

can handle deletion of files from the S3 buckets to clean up the backend even if the item JSON is out of sync
(i.e. the files are not referenced in the item JSON)

```
param item_id

The ID of the ScienceBase item

param filenames

a list of filenames to be deleted
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.start_esri_service
documentation:
Creates a spatial service on a ScienceBase service definition (.sd) file in ArcGIS Online or ArcGIS Server.
The service definition file must have been published to the public ScienceBase S3 bucket.
User will receive an email notification when process is complete.

> ```
> param item_id
>
> The ID of the ScienceBase item
>
> param filename
>
> The filename of the .sd file (only works for files in the public S3 bucket)
> ```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.stop_esri_service
documentation:
Stops a spatial service that had been published on a ScienceBase service definition (.sd) file in ArcGIS Online or ArcGIS Server.
\:param item_id: The ID of the ScienceBase item
\:param filename: The filename of the .sd file in ScienceBase on which the ArcGIS Online or ArcGIS Server spatial service had been published

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.publish_item
documentation:
Publish the item, adding PUBLIC read permissions. User must be USGS or in the publisher role.
\:param item_id: The ID of the ScienceBase item
\:return: The permissions JSON for the given item

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.unpublish_item
documentation:
Unpublish the item, removing PUBLIC read permissions.
\:param item_id: The ID of the ScienceBase item
\:return: The permissions JSON for the given item

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession._update_acls
documentation:
Update ACLs for the specified item.

```
param add_remove

ACL_ADD or ACL_REMOVE to specify operation

param read_write

ACL_READ or ACL_WRITE to specify permission type

param acl_name

Role or user update

param item_id

The ID of the ScienceBase item

return

The permissions JSON for the given item
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.set_acls_inherit
documentation:
Set the item to inherit ACLs from its parent item.

```
param read_write

ACL_READ or ACL_WRITE to specify permission type

param item_id

The ID of the ScienceBase item

return

The permissions JSON for the given item
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.set_acls_inherit_read
documentation:
Set the item to inherit READ ACLs from its parent item.

```
param item_id

The ID of the ScienceBase item

return

The permissions JSON for the given item
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.set_acls_inherit_write
documentation:
Set the item to inherit WRITE ACLs from its parent item.

```
param item_id

The ID of the ScienceBase item

return

The permissions JSON for the given item
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.has_public_read
documentation:
Return whether the given ACLs include public READ permissions.

```
param acls

Item ACL JSON

return

Whether the given ACLs include public READ permissions.
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.print_acls
documentation:
Pretty print the given ACL JSON.

```
param acls

Item ACL JSON
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.get_item_link_types
documentation:
Get ItemLink type JSON list from the vocabulary server.

```
return

JSON of all available ItemLink types
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.get_item_link_type_by_name
documentation:
Get ItemLink type JSON object from the vocabulary server for the given type.

```
param link_type_name

Name of the ItemLink type

return

ItemLink type JSON object from the vocabulary server for the given type
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.get_item_links
documentation:
Get ItemLink (relationship) JSON describing relationships involving the Item with the given ID.

```
param item_id

Item ID

return

ItemLink JSON
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.create_item_link
documentation:
Create an ItemLink (relationship) between the two items of the specified type.

```
param from_item_id

From item. This item must be writeable by the caller.

param to_item_id

To item

param link_type_id

ID of the link type (retrieve using get_item_link_types or get_item_link_type_by_name)

param reverse

Whether to reverse the relationsip

return

ItemLink JSON
```

methods.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.create_related_item_link
documentation:
Create a 'related' ItemLink (relationship) between the two items.

```
param from_item_id

From item

param to_item_id

To item

return

ItemLink JSON
```

class_variables.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.ACL_ADD
documentation: Add ACL

class_variables.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.ACL_REMOVE
documentation: Remove ACL

class_variables.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.ACL_READ
documentation: Read ACL

class_variables.name: sciencebasepy.SbSession.SbSession.ACL_WRITE
documentation: Write ACL

SbSession encapsulates a session with ScienceBase, and provides methods for working with
ScienceBase Catalog Items.
